fields.产品名称: Multifunctional foldable portable tough durable golf knife
fields.简要说明: This multifunctional golf knife makes your golf journey more exciting, convenient and perfect.Rush service is provided.
fields.完整描述: Our golf multi-function knife is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is durable and textured. It is small and easy to carry, and can be easily put into the side pocket of a golf bag. It is very powerful. It is equipped with a variety of practical tools, such as a sharp knife that can be used to cut things in emergency situations, such as opening packages and trimming ropes. In addition, there are tools such as iron forks, iron sticks, brushes, etc., which can meet various needs on the golf course and in daily life. Folding design, equipped with a keychain, easy to carry Whether you are a professional golfer or an amateur, this golf multi-function knife can add convenience and fun to your golf journey. Choose it to make your golf experience more perfect.
